variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 18174 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 18174 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 18174 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 118.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 106.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 80.5 mm, Height 1 (H1): 325.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 323.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 22.5 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AA90145 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18174
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AA90145 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18174
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AA90145 dual pack air kit provide a convenient all-in-one solution by including all required filters in one package to speed up a filter change to save time and money.  This pack contains: AF26614-1 and AF26613-1
